

```{r}
#Representação do plano com 84 parâmetros


stores <- c("baltimore", "lancaster", "philadelphia", "richmond")
S <- length(stores)
DAYS <- 7
VARS <- 3  # J, X, PR

# s (len=84) -> list(J=4x7, X=4x7, PR=4x7)
decode_solution <- function(s, S=4, DAYS=7) {
  stopifnot(length(s) == S*DAYS*3)
  n <- S*DAYS
  
  J  <- matrix(s[1:n],           nrow=S, ncol=DAYS, byrow=TRUE)
  X  <- matrix(s[(n+1):(2*n)],   nrow=S, ncol=DAYS, byrow=TRUE)
  PR <- matrix(s[(2*n+1):(3*n)], nrow=S, ncol=DAYS, byrow=TRUE)
  
  list(J=J, X=X, PR=PR)
}

# list(J,X,PR) -> s (len=84)
encode_solution <- function(J, X, PR) {
  c(as.vector(t(J)), as.vector(t(X)), as.vector(t(PR)))
}
```

```{r}
# Parâmetros por loja

# Capacidades
CAP_X <- 7
CAP_J <- 6

# Custos RH por dia
HR_COST <- list(
  X_weekday = 80, X_weekend = 95,
  J_weekday = 60, J_weekend = 70
)

# Weekend: Sunday(1) e Saturday(7)
IS_WEEKEND <- c(TRUE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE)

# Parâmetros por loja (FJ, FX, custo fixo semanal Ws)
STORE_PARAMS <- list(
  baltimore    = list(FJ=1.00, FX=1.15, W=700),
  lancaster    = list(FJ=1.05, FX=1.20, W=730),
  philadelphia = list(FJ=1.10, FX=1.15, W=760),
  richmond     = list(FJ=1.15, FX=1.25, W=800)
)
```


```{r}
#Avaliação por loja

eval_store_week <- function(Jd, Xd, PRd, pred7, store_name) {
  p <- STORE_PARAMS[[store_name]]
  FJ <- p$FJ; FX <- p$FX; W <- p$W
  
  # arredondamentos/limites
  Jd  <- pmax(0, round(Jd))
  Xd  <- pmax(0, round(Xd))
  PRd <- pmax(0, pmin(0.30, PRd))
  
  weekly_profit <- 0
  weekly_units  <- 0
  weekly_hr     <- 0
  
  for (d in 1:7) {
    C_d <- pred7[d]
    
    # clientes assistidos: primeiro X depois J
    by_X <- min(Xd[d] * CAP_X, C_d)
    by_J <- min(Jd[d] * CAP_J, max(0, C_d - by_X))
    
    # unidades por cliente (depende do F e PR)
    log_term <- log(2 - PRd[d])
    U_X <- round(FX * 10 / log_term)
    U_J <- round(FJ * 10 / log_term)
    
    # unidades totais
    Xunits <- by_X * U_X
    Junits <- by_J * U_J
    units_d <- Xunits + Junits
    
    # lucro de vendas (profit) por tipo
    Xsales <- round(Xunits * (1 - PRd[d]) * 1.07)
    Jsales <- round(Junits * (1 - PRd[d]) * 1.07)
    
    # custos RH
    if (IS_WEEKEND[d]) {
      XHRc <- Xd[d] * HR_COST$X_weekend
      JHRc <- Jd[d] * HR_COST$J_weekend
    } else {
      XHRc <- Xd[d] * HR_COST$X_weekday
      JHRc <- Jd[d] * HR_COST$J_weekday
    }
    
    profit_d <- (Xsales + Jsales) - (XHRc + JHRc)
    
    weekly_profit <- weekly_profit + profit_d
    weekly_units  <- weekly_units  + units_d
    weekly_hr     <- weekly_hr     + (Xd[d] + Jd[d])
  }
  
  # lucro semanal líquido
  weekly_profit <- weekly_profit - W
  
  list(profit=weekly_profit, units=weekly_units, hr=weekly_hr)
}

```

```{r}
#avaliação Global - 4 lojas

eval_allstores <- function(s, preds_by_store) {
  # preds_by_store: named list com 4 vetores (7 dias)
  dec <- decode_solution(s, S=length(stores), DAYS=7)
  
  total_profit <- 0
  total_units  <- 0
  total_hr     <- 0
  
  for (i in seq_along(stores)) {
    st <- stores[i]
    out <- eval_store_week(dec$J[i,], dec$X[i,], dec$PR[i,], preds_by_store[[st]], st)
    total_profit <- total_profit + out$profit
    total_units  <- total_units  + out$units
    total_hr     <- total_hr     + out$hr
  }
  
  c(profit=total_profit, units=total_units, hr=total_hr)
}
```



```{r}
# O2: constraint hard ≤ 10.000 unidades - Repair determinístico (robusto e simples)

repair_O2 <- function(s, preds_by_store, upper, max_units=10000) {
  dec <- decode_solution(s, S=length(stores), DAYS=7)
  
  # clamp inicial aos bounds
  s <- pmax(s, 0)
  s <- pmin(s, upper)
  dec <- decode_solution(s, S=length(stores), DAYS=7)
  
  # função auxiliar para medir units
  get_units <- function(dec) {
    s_tmp <- encode_solution(dec$J, dec$X, dec$PR)
    eval_allstores(s_tmp, preds_by_store)["units"]
  }
  
  units <- get_units(dec)
  if (units <= max_units) return(s)
  
  # 1) reduzir PR gradualmente
  for (k in 1:20) {
    dec$PR <- dec$PR * 0.90
    units <- get_units(dec)
    if (units <= max_units) {
      s2 <- encode_solution(dec$J, dec$X, dec$PR)
      return(pmin(pmax(s2, 0), upper))
    }
  }
  
  # 2) se PR já baixo, reduzir RH proporcionalmente
  units <- get_units(dec)
  if (units > max_units) {
    ratio <- max_units / units  # < 1
    dec$J <- pmax(0, round(dec$J * ratio))
    dec$X <- pmax(0, round(dec$X * ratio))
  }
  
  s2 <- encode_solution(dec$J, dec$X, dec$PR)
  s2 <- pmin(pmax(s2, 0), upper)
  
  # segunda passagem: se ainda violar, repetir ligeiro
  # (opcional, para segurança)
  for (k in 1:10) {
    units2 <- eval_allstores(s2, preds_by_store)["units"]
    if (units2 <= max_units) break
    # corta HR adicional
    dec2 <- decode_solution(s2, S=length(stores), DAYS=7)
    dec2$J <- pmax(0, dec2$J - 1)
    dec2$X <- pmax(0, dec2$X - 1)
    s2 <- pmin(pmax(encode_solution(dec2$J, dec2$X, dec2$PR), 0), upper)
  }
  
  s2
}


```

```{r}
# O2: constraint hard ≤ 10.000 unidades - Penalização suave

penalty_units <- function(units, max_units=10000, lambda=0.05) {
  # penalização quadrática a partir do limite
  excess <- max(0, units - max_units)
  lambda * excess^2
}

```

```{r}
# O3: multiobjetivo via pesos com normalização (profit vs HR) - Normalização prática (via amostragem Monte Carlo rápida)

estimate_norm_constants <- function(preds_by_store, lower, upper, n=200) {
  set.seed(1)
  vals <- matrix(NA, nrow=n, ncol=3)
  colnames(vals) <- c("profit","units","hr")
  
  for (i in 1:n) {
    s <- runif(length(lower), min=lower, max=upper)
    # arredonda J/X depois no eval; PR fica real
    v <- eval_allstores(s, preds_by_store)
    vals[i,] <- v
  }
  
  list(
    profit_min = min(vals[,"profit"]),
    profit_max = max(vals[,"profit"]),
    hr_min     = min(vals[,"hr"]),
    hr_max     = max(vals[,"hr"])
  )
}

norm01 <- function(x, xmin, xmax) {
  if (xmax == xmin) return(0.5)
  (x - xmin) / (xmax - xmin)
}

```

```{r}
# Função objetivo única para O3 (maximizar)

# w controla importância do lucro vs HR.
# lucro normalizado sobe (bom), HR normalizado sobe (mau) → entra com sinal negativo.
# inclui constraint O2 via repair ou penalização.


objective_O3 <- function(s, preds_by_store, lower, upper, normC,
                         w=0.7, use_repair=TRUE,
                         max_units=10000, lambda=0.05) {
  
  s <- pmin(pmax(s, lower), upper)
  
  if (use_repair) {
    s <- repair_O2(s, preds_by_store, upper, max_units=max_units)
    v <- eval_allstores(s, preds_by_store)
    # após repair não há penalização (em princípio)
    pen <- 0
  } else {
    v <- eval_allstores(s, preds_by_store)
    pen <- penalty_units(v["units"], max_units=max_units, lambda=lambda)
  }
  
  profit_n <- norm01(v["profit"], normC$profit_min, normC$profit_max)
  hr_n     <- norm01(v["hr"],     normC$hr_min,     normC$hr_max)
  
  # maximizar: lucro alto e HR baixo
  score <- w * profit_n - (1 - w) * hr_n - pen
  list(score=as.numeric(score), metrics=v, s_repaired=s)
}
```

```{r}
# Hill Climbing com change function - Função de vizinhança (robusta para zeros)

# Para J/X (inteiros): usa (x+1)*(1+δ)-1 para não ficar preso no zero.
# Para PR: multiplicativo + clamp [0,0.30].
# Perturba só uma fração das variáveis para controlar “granularidade”.

neighbor_multiplicative <- function(s, lower, upper,
                                   p_change=0.15, step=0.20) {
  n <- length(s)
  idx <- which(runif(n) < p_change)
  if (length(idx) == 0) idx <- sample(1:n, 1)
  
  s2 <- s
  delta <- runif(length(idx), -step, step)
  
  # identificar blocos
  nBlock <- n/3
  idxJ  <- idx[idx <= nBlock]
  idxX  <- idx[idx > nBlock & idx <= 2*nBlock]
  idxPR <- idx[idx > 2*nBlock]
  
  # J e X: multiplicativo com deslocamento
  if (length(idxJ) > 0) {
    s2[idxJ] <- (s2[idxJ] + 1) * (1 + delta[match(idxJ, idx)]) - 1
  }
  if (length(idxX) > 0) {
    s2[idxX] <- (s2[idxX] + 1) * (1 + delta[match(idxX, idx)]) - 1
  }
  if (length(idxPR) > 0) {
    s2[idxPR] <- s2[idxPR] * (1 + delta[match(idxPR, idx)])
  }
  
  # clamp
  s2 <- pmin(pmax(s2, lower), upper)
  s2
}


```

```{r}
# Hill Climbing com change function - Maximização

hill_climb <- function(s0, fn_obj, lower, upper,
                       iters=2000, p_change=0.15, step=0.20,
                       trace=TRUE) {
  s_best <- pmin(pmax(s0, lower), upper)
  o_best <- fn_obj(s_best)
  best_score <- o_best$score
  best_metrics <- o_best$metrics
  best_srep <- o_best$s_repaired
  
  if (trace) cat("init score=", best_score, " profit=", best_metrics["profit"],
                 " units=", best_metrics["units"], " hr=", best_metrics["hr"], "\n")
  
  for (t in 1:iters) {
    s_new <- neighbor_multiplicative(s_best, lower, upper, p_change, step)
    o_new <- fn_obj(s_new)
    
    if (o_new$score > best_score) {
      s_best <- s_new
      best_score <- o_new$score
      best_metrics <- o_new$metrics
      best_srep <- o_new$s_repaired
      
      if (trace && (t %% 50 == 0)) {
        cat("iter", t, " score=", round(best_score,4),
            " profit=", best_metrics["profit"],
            " units=", best_metrics["units"],
            " hr=", best_metrics["hr"], "\n")
      }
    }
  }
  
  list(s=s_best, s_repaired=best_srep, score=best_score, metrics=best_metrics)
}

```

```{r}
# Bounds 

calc_bounds <- function(preds_by_store) {
  # preds_by_store: list(nome_loja -> vetor len 7)
  lower <- rep(0, length(stores)*DAYS*3)
  
  # upper por loja/dia:
  # Jmax ~ ceil(C/CAP_J), Xmax ~ ceil(C/CAP_X), PRmax = 0.30
  Jmax <- Xmax <- PRmax <- matrix(0, nrow=length(stores), ncol=DAYS)
  
  for (i in seq_along(stores)) {
    C <- preds_by_store[[stores[i]]]
    Jmax[i,] <- ceiling(C / CAP_J)
    Xmax[i,] <- ceiling(C / CAP_X)
    PRmax[i,] <- rep(0.30, DAYS)
  }
  
  upper <- encode_solution(Jmax, Xmax, PRmax)
  list(lower=lower, upper=upper)
}


```

```{r}
# grid de pesos
Wgrid <- seq(0.1, 1, by=0.1)

set.seed(42)
results <- list()

for (w in Wgrid) {
  fn <- function(s) objective_O3(
    s, preds_by_store, lower, upper, normC,
    w = w, use_repair = TRUE, max_units = 10000
  )
  
  s0 <- runif(length(lower), min=lower, max=upper)
  HC <- hill_climb(s0, fn, lower, upper,
                   iters=2000, p_change=0.12, step=0.18, trace=FALSE)
  
  results[[paste0("w=", w)]] <- list(
    w = w,
    score = HC$score,
    profit = as.numeric(HC$metrics["profit"]),
    units  = as.numeric(HC$metrics["units"]),
    hr     = as.numeric(HC$metrics["hr"]),
    s_repaired = HC$s_repaired
  )
  
  cat("w=", w,
      " profit=", results[[paste0("w=", w)]]$profit,
      " units=",  results[[paste0("w=", w)]]$units,
      " hr=",     results[[paste0("w=", w)]]$hr, "\n")
}

# ----------- ESCOLHER O MELHOR (COM FILTRO) -----------
scores  <- sapply(results, function(x) x$score)
profits <- sapply(results, function(x) x$profit)

valid <- profits >= 0

if (any(valid)) {
  best_key <- names(results)[ which.max(ifelse(valid, scores, -Inf)) ]
} else {
  cat("\nAviso: não houve soluções com lucro >= 0. Vou escolher o maior lucro.\n")
  best_key <- names(results)[ which.max(profits) ]
}

best_run <- results[[best_key]]

cat("\nBEST (filtered):", best_key,
    " profit=", best_run$profit,
    " units=",  best_run$units,
    " hr=",     best_run$hr, "\n")


```

```{r}
# O1 por loja


# ------------------------------
# Representação 1 loja (21 vars)
# ------------------------------
decode_store_solution <- function(s1) {
  stopifnot(length(s1) == 21)
  list(
    J  = s1[1:7],
    X  = s1[8:14],
    PR = s1[15:21]
  )
}

encode_store_solution <- function(J, X, PR) {
  c(J, X, PR)
}
```

```{r}
# Bounds Por Loja

calc_bounds_store <- function(pred7) {
  lower <- rep(0, 21)
  upper <- c(
    ceiling(pred7 / CAP_J),  # J max por dia
    ceiling(pred7 / CAP_X),  # X max por dia
    rep(0.30, 7)             # PR max
  )
  list(lower=lower, upper=upper)
}
```

```{r}
# Objetivo O1 por loja (maximizar lucro semanal da loja)

objective_O1_store <- function(s1, pred7, store_name, lower, upper) {
  s1 <- pmin(pmax(s1, lower), upper)
  dec <- decode_store_solution(s1)
  
  out <- eval_store_week(dec$J, dec$X, dec$PR, pred7, store_name)
  
  list(
    score = as.numeric(out$profit),   # maximizar lucro semanal
    metrics = out,
    s_repaired = s1
  )
}
```

```{r}
#  Função “runner” do Hill Climbing para O1

run_O1_per_store <- function(preds_by_store, iters=2000, p_change=0.12, step=0.18, seed=42) {
  set.seed(seed)
  resO1 <- list()
  
  for (st in stores) {
    pred7 <- preds_by_store[[st]]
    bnd  <- calc_bounds_store(pred7)
    lower1 <- bnd$lower
    upper1 <- bnd$upper
    
    fn1 <- function(s1) objective_O1_store(s1, pred7, st, lower1, upper1)
    s0 <- runif(21, min=lower1, max=upper1)
    
    HC <- hill_climb(s0, fn1, lower1, upper1,
                     iters=iters, p_change=p_change, step=step, trace=FALSE)
    
    resO1[[st]] <- list(
      store  = st,
      profit = HC$metrics$profit,
      units  = HC$metrics$units,
      hr     = HC$metrics$hr,
      s_best = HC$s_repaired
    )
    
    cat("[O1]", st,
        "profit=", resO1[[st]]$profit,
        "units=",  resO1[[st]]$units,
        "hr=",     resO1[[st]]$hr, "\n")
  }
  
  resO1
}

```

```{r}
O1_results <- run_O1_per_store(preds_by_store, iters=2000)
```

```{r}
best_run$s_repaired <- repair_O2(best_run$s_repaired, preds_by_store, upper, max_units=10000)
```

```{r}
# print_plan() no estilo “Weekend elements” (por loja e dia)

eval_store_daily_details <- function(Jd, Xd, PRd, pred7, store_name) {
  p <- STORE_PARAMS[[store_name]]
  FJ <- p$FJ; FX <- p$FX
  
  # limpar inputs
  Jd  <- pmax(0, round(Jd))
  Xd  <- pmax(0, round(Xd))
  PRd <- pmax(0, pmin(0.30, PRd))
  
  day_names <- c("su","mo","tu","we","th","fr","sa")
  
  details <- data.frame(
    day = day_names,
    weekend = IS_WEEKEND,
    customers = pred7,
    PR = round(PRd, 3),
    X  = Xd,
    J  = Jd,
    assisted = NA_integer_,
    units = NA_integer_,
    hr_cost = NA_real_,
    profit = NA_real_
  )
  
  for (d in 1:7) {
    C_d <- pred7[d]
    
    # assistidos (X primeiro)
    by_X <- min(Xd[d] * CAP_X, C_d)
    by_J <- min(Jd[d] * CAP_J, max(0, C_d - by_X))
    A_d  <- by_X + by_J
    
    log_term <- log(2 - PRd[d])
    U_X <- round(FX * 10 / log_term)
    U_J <- round(FJ * 10 / log_term)
    
    Xunits <- by_X * U_X
    Junits <- by_J * U_J
    units_d <- Xunits + Junits
    
    Xsales <- round(Xunits * (1 - PRd[d]) * 1.07)
    Jsales <- round(Junits * (1 - PRd[d]) * 1.07)
    
    if (IS_WEEKEND[d]) {
      XHRc <- Xd[d] * HR_COST$X_weekend
      JHRc <- Jd[d] * HR_COST$J_weekend
    } else {
      XHRc <- Xd[d] * HR_COST$X_weekday
      JHRc <- Jd[d] * HR_COST$J_weekday
    }
    hr_cost_d <- XHRc + JHRc
    
    profit_d <- (Xsales + Jsales) - hr_cost_d
    
    details$assisted[d] <- A_d
    details$units[d]    <- units_d
    details$hr_cost[d]  <- hr_cost_d
    details$profit[d]   <- profit_d
  }
  
  details
}
```

```{r}

print_plan <- function(s_repaired, preds_by_store, show_extra=TRUE, digits=2) {
  dec <- decode_solution(s_repaired, S=length(stores), DAYS=7)
  
  cat("============================================================\n")
  cat("WEEKLY PLAN (4 stores) — PR, J, X, profit_d, units_d\n")
  cat("============================================================\n\n")
  
  total_profit <- 0
  total_units  <- 0
  total_hr     <- 0
  
  for (i in seq_along(stores)) {
    st <- stores[i]
    pred7 <- preds_by_store[[st]]
    
    det <- eval_store_daily_details(dec$J[i,], dec$X[i,], dec$PR[i,], pred7, st)
    
    # resumo semanal (igual ao eval_store_week)
    week <- eval_store_week(dec$J[i,], dec$X[i,], dec$PR[i,], pred7, st)
    total_profit <- total_profit + week$profit
    total_units  <- total_units  + week$units
    total_hr     <- total_hr     + week$hr
    
    cat("------------------------------------------------------------\n")
    cat("STORE:", toupper(st), "\n")
    cat("Weekly profit (net):", round(week$profit, digits), 
        "| Weekly units:", week$units,
        "| Weekly HR:", week$hr, "\n")
    cat("------------------------------------------------------------\n")
    
    if (show_extra) {
      # inclui customers, assisted, hr_cost
      print(det[, c("day","weekend","customers","PR","X","J","assisted","units","hr_cost","profit")], row.names=FALSE)
    } else {
      # apenas o pedido essencial (estilo slides)
      print(det[, c("day","PR","X","J","units","profit")], row.names=FALSE)
    }
    
    cat("\n")
  }
  
  cat("============================================================\n")
  cat("TOTAL (4 stores): profit=", round(total_profit, digits),
      " | units=", total_units,
      " | HR=", total_hr, "\n")
  cat("============================================================\n")
  
  invisible(list(profit=total_profit, units=total_units, hr=total_hr))
}

```

```{r}
best_key <- names(results)[ which.max(sapply(results, function(x) x$score)) ]
best_run <- results[[best_key]]


# garantir validade final O2:
best_run$s_repaired <- repair_O2(best_run$s_repaired, preds_by_store, upper, max_units=10000)

# imprimir estilo slides:
print_plan(best_run$s_repaired, preds_by_store, show_extra=TRUE)

```

```{r}
#Converter results (lista) para data.frame

results_to_df <- function(results) {
  df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(results), function(k) {
    x <- results[[k]]
    data.frame(
      key    = k,
      w      = as.numeric(x$w),
      profit = as.numeric(x$profit),
      hr     = as.numeric(x$hr),
      units  = as.numeric(x$units),
      score  = as.numeric(x$score)
    )
  }))
  rownames(df) <- NULL
  df
}
```

```{r}
#Identificar a “pseudo‑Pareto front” (não dominados)

pareto_front <- function(df) {
  n <- nrow(df)
  nd <- rep(TRUE, n)  # não-dominado (nondominated)

  for (i in 1:n) {
    for (j in 1:n) {
      if (i != j) {
        dominates <- (df$profit[j] >= df$profit[i]) &&
                    (df$hr[j]     <= df$hr[i]) &&
                    ((df$profit[j] > df$profit[i]) || (df$hr[j] < df$hr[i]))
        if (dominates) {
          nd[i] <- FALSE
          break
        }
      }
    }
  }
  df$is_pareto <- nd
  df
}
```

```{r}
plot_tradeoff <- function(results, show_labels=TRUE, highlight_pareto=TRUE) {
  # aceitar results (lista) ou df
  if (is.list(results) && !is.data.frame(results)) {
    df <- results_to_df(results)
  } else {
    df <- results
  }
  
  if (highlight_pareto) df <- pareto_front(df) else df$is_pareto <- FALSE
  
  # garantir ggplot2
  if (!requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly=TRUE)) {
    stop("Precisas do pacote ggplot2. Instala com: install.packages('ggplot2')")
  }
  library(ggplot2)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x=hr, y=profit, color=w)) +
    geom_point(size=3, alpha=0.9) +
    scale_color_gradient(low="royalblue3", high="firebrick3") +
    labs(
      title = "O3 — Compromisso Profit vs HR (cores por peso w)",
      subtitle = "Cada ponto é o melhor plano encontrado para um peso w (Hill Climbing).",
      x = "HR total semanal (Σ(J+X) nas 4 lojas)",
      y = "Lucro total semanal ($) (4 lojas)",
      color = "w (peso lucro)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  
  # destacar pontos Pareto (não dominados)
  if (highlight_pareto) {
    p <- p +
      geom_point(
        data = subset(df, is_pareto),
        aes(x=hr, y=profit),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        shape = 21, fill = "gold",
        color = "black", size = 4, stroke = 1.1
      )
  }
  
  # rótulos w (bom quando tens poucos pontos)
  if (show_labels) {
    p <- p +
      geom_text(
        aes(label=sprintf("w=%.1f", w)),
        nudge_y = 0.02 * diff(range(df$profit)),
        size = 3,
        show.legend = FALSE
      )
  }
  
  # “linha” ligando os pontos por w (ajuda a ver tendência)
  df_ord <- df[order(df$w), ]
  p <- p + geom_path(data=df_ord, aes(x=hr, y=profit), inherit.aes=FALSE,
                     color="grey50", linewidth=0.6, alpha=0.6)
  
  # se quiseres desenhar a Pareto-front como linha
  if (highlight_pareto) {
    pf <- subset(df, is_pareto)
    # ordenar por HR crescente
    pf <- pf[order(pf$hr), ]
    if (nrow(pf) >= 2) {
      p <- p + geom_path(data=pf, aes(x=hr, y=profit), inherit.aes=FALSE,
                         color="black", linewidth=1.0, alpha=0.9)
    }
  }
  
  p
}
```

```{r}
p <- plot_tradeoff(results, show_labels=TRUE, highlight_pareto=TRUE)
print(p)
```

```{r}
df <- pareto_front(results_to_df(results))
df[order(df$w), c("w","profit","hr","units","score","is_pareto")]
```

```{r}

```
